description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat roof and a multi-level design, situated on a landscaped plot with greenery and paved walkways. The structure features clean, angular lines and a combination of white and gray exterior surfaces, with extensive use of glass for windows and doors. The house includes multiple outdoor terraces and balconies, as well as a prominent main entrance accessible via a paved path. The landscaping incorporates shrubs and small trees, particularly concentrated near the front and side of the house. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large floor-to-ceiling panes and others in horizontal bands. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed house with white and gray exterior, extensive glass windows, and landscaped surroundings. The design features multiple levels, terraces, and asymmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an elevated angle, highlighting the landscaped area with shrubs and a paved path leading to the main entrance.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, emphasizing the long facade with large windows and the flat roof structure.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, revealing additional terraces and a more private garden area.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a view of the opposite side, showcasing the main outdoor terrace, extensive windows, and the integration of greenery along the facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved path, steps, and a minimalist door, flanked by landscaping and lacking decorative columns or overhangs.
